reviews.review_description: This game will ask for an email then won’t accept it. But if you somehow manage to get past the email stage, it will ask for a coupon which I don’t even know how to get or even if you can get one so I wouldn’t recommend wasting your time on this game.

developer_response.body:
This game is available only via franchisee mode (B2B2C). To onboard yourself as franchisee please mail to meta@6dof.studio.

Thanks,
Yoyo Cricket team

reviews.review_description:
I have played almost all cricket games available in Quest2.  This is completely different.  The unique multiplayer game (fielding setting and bowling from mobile phone) is real fun. My competitive spirit kicked in. I tried different bowling to my friend like yorker, bouncer, googly etc etc. Love to play this game again and again. The only problem is this is not available for direct purchase, you can play from their authorized franchisees.  

YOYO Team - when will you launch personal edition  ?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience. We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the game. We've noted your request for a personal edition. While we don't have that feature now, we will release it soon. Stay tuned!

Thanks,
YOYO Cricket team.

reviews.review_description: I recently had the chance to dive into the world of the VR Cricket Game, and I must say, it's an experience like no other. From the moment I put on the headset, I was transported to the cricket field, complete with the cheers of the crowd and the thrill of the game.

Game does not start.. It asks for a coupon and if you don't have a coupon it asks for a email id which it does not accept.. There is nothing to enter an underscore ( _) in the email.. And if you enter an email id which does not have a ' _ ' still it does not accept that email.. At least provide the coupon for the game when you are in developing stage

developer_response.body:
This game is available only via franchisee mode (B2B2C). To onboard yourself as franchisee please mail to meta@6dof.studio.

Thanks,
Yoyo Cricket team

reviews.review_description:
Still is very early stages if the game but from this stage to completely awesome stage doesn’t seem to be far. Waiting for a full on multi player game

— Santhinesh

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words and understanding. We're thrilled to hear that you see potential in our game despite its early stages. Your enthusiasm for a full-on multiplayer experience echoes our own excitement, and we're working diligently to bring that to you soon. Your support and patience mean everything to us. Stay tuned for more updates!
